draft:
To Whom It May Concern:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Raghav Iyer, based on his outstanding performance and contributions during his tenure at Zenith Industries. As a Senior Partner at Zenith, I have had the opportunity to observe Mr. Iyer's work closely and can attest to his exceptional skills and dedication to his field. 

To provide some context, I have been with Zenith Industries for over 19 years, currently serving as a Senior Partner. Throughout my tenure, I have focused on sustainability and climate technologies, leading the Zenith Platform for Climate Technologies (ZPCT). My expertise extends to areas such as the Internet of Things, semiconductors, and AI, with a particular emphasis on hard-tech solutions for climate impact. In addition to my consulting experience, I have held leadership roles in the biotechnology sector, including serving as the SVP of Commercial Operations and Head of Strategy at Avilla Biotechnologies. My educational background includes an MBA from the University of California, Berkeley Haas School of Business and Bachelor's and Master's degrees in Manufacturing Engineering from the University of Oxford. This diverse experience has equipped me with a deep understanding of the skills and qualities necessary for success in the fields of sustainability and technology.

Zenith Industries is a globally recognized management consulting firm that advises leaders in business, government, and society on their most critical issues. With over 40,000 employees across more than 130 offices in over 65 countries, Zenith brings deep expertise and a global perspective to help clients achieve sustainable and inclusive growth. The firm's work spans a wide range of industries and functional areas, including strategy, operations, marketing, and technology. As a Senior Partner, I have had the privilege of working with clients across the globe to tackle complex challenges and drive meaningful change. This experience has given me a keen insight into the qualities that distinguish truly exceptional professionals in the consulting field.

Mr. Iyer joined Zenith Industries as a Business Analyst in August 2020 and quickly distinguished himself through his exceptional analytical skills and dedication to his work. Over the course of his tenure, he worked on a wide range of high-impact projects, consistently delivering outstanding results. One of his most notable contributions was his work on developing a financial model and impact analysis that enabled a $2 billion fundraise and the launch of a new renewable energy non-profit organization at COP26. This project, which aimed to accelerate renewable energy and climate solutions, was a significant achievement that demonstrated Mr. Iyer's ability to tackle complex challenges and drive meaningful change. His analysis was instrumental in securing the necessary funding and support for this critical initiative, showcasing his expertise in sustainability and his ability to deliver tangible results.

In addition to his work on the renewable energy non-profit, Mr. Iyer also played a key role in developing an EU expansion strategy for a sustainable cement startup. His efforts helped the company raise over $100 million in equity, unlocking significant growth potential and positioning the startup for success in the European market. This project highlighted Mr. Iyer's strategic thinking and his ability to identify and capitalize on new opportunities. His work on this initiative was critical to the startup's success and demonstrated his ability to drive growth and create value for clients.

Throughout his time at Zenith, Mr. Iyer consistently demonstrated a strong commitment to sustainability and a passion for driving positive change. His work on projects such as the renewable energy non-profit and the sustainable cement startup showcased his ability to leverage his skills and expertise to make a meaningful impact. His contributions were highly valued by both his colleagues and clients, and he quickly became a trusted advisor on sustainability-related issues.

Mr. Iyer's impressive performance and dedication to his work led to his promotion to Senior Business Analyst in October 2022. In this role, he continued to excel, taking on even greater responsibilities and delivering outstanding results on a wide range of projects. One of his most significant achievements was his work on developing a product offtake strategy for a biogas private equity client. His efforts helped the client secure $500 million in debt and equity for their first project, providing a solid foundation for future growth and success. This project demonstrated Mr. Iyer's ability to develop innovative solutions and drive tangible results for clients.

In addition to his work on the biogas project, Mr. Iyer also played a key role in crafting an investment thesis and identifying priority investment themes for a $200 million carveout dedicated to solar energy. His analysis led to the identification of 10 high-priority targets and the successful due diligence of the first two investments. This project showcased Mr. Iyer's expertise in sustainable investing and his ability to identify and capitalize on new opportunities in the renewable energy sector.

Throughout his tenure as a Senior Business Analyst, Mr. Iyer consistently demonstrated a strong commitment to sustainability and a passion for driving positive change. His work on projects such as the biogas offtake strategy and the solar investment thesis highlighted his ability to leverage his skills and expertise to make a meaningful impact. His contributions were highly valued by both his colleagues and clients, and he quickly became a trusted advisor on sustainability-related issues.

In addition to his impressive project work, Mr. Iyer also took on significant leadership roles within the firm. He co-led the New York Green Team, launching an office-wide composting initiative and building the office's sustainability community. This initiative demonstrated his commitment to sustainability not only in his client work but also within the firm itself. His leadership in this area helped to foster a culture of sustainability at Zenith, inspiring others to take action and make a positive impact.

Mr. Iyer's exceptional performance and dedication to his work did not go unnoticed. In recognition of his outstanding contributions, he was selected as one of only two Sustainability Fellows in the New York office, and one of 40 globally, in September 2021. This prestigious fellowship program was designed to build the firm's expertise in sustainability and provide high-performing individuals with the opportunity to deepen their knowledge and skills in this critical area.

As a Sustainability Fellow, Mr. Iyer had the opportunity to work on a wide range of high-impact projects, further honing his expertise in sustainability and climate-related issues. One of his most notable contributions during this time was his work on building and launching the world's first ocean conservation credits to protect the entire marine area of the country of Samoa. This groundbreaking project demonstrated his ability to develop innovative solutions to complex environmental challenges and make a tangible impact on global conservation efforts.

Throughout his tenure as a Sustainability Fellow, Mr. Iyer continued to excel, consistently delivering outstanding results and driving meaningful change. His work on projects such as the ocean conservation credits showcased his ability to leverage his skills and expertise to make a significant impact on pressing environmental issues. His contributions were highly valued by both his colleagues and clients, and he quickly became a trusted advisor on sustainability-related matters.

Mr. Iyer's selection as a Sustainability Fellow was a testament to his exceptional performance and dedication to his work. This prestigious program provided him with the opportunity to further develop his skills and expertise in sustainability, positioning him as a leader in this critical area. His contributions during this time were highly impactful, and he continued to make a significant difference in the firm's sustainability efforts.

In addition to his impressive project work and leadership roles, Mr. Iyer also demonstrated a strong commitment to professional development and knowledge sharing. He actively sought out opportunities to expand his expertise and stay at the forefront of industry trends. This dedication to continuous learning was evident in his participation in various training programs and his engagement with thought leadership initiatives.

Mr. Iyer's contributions to Zenith's thought leadership were particularly noteworthy. He co-authored several articles on sustainability and climate-related topics, showcasing his deep expertise and ability to communicate complex ideas effectively. One such article, published on the Zenith website, explored strategies for oilfield services and equipment (OFSE) companies confronting the energy transition. This piece provided valuable insights into how these companies could adapt to the changing energy landscape and capitalize on new opportunities in renewable energy and other sustainable technologies.

Another article co-authored by Mr. Iyer focused on the top five market shifts and their implications for the OFSE sector. This piece, which was also featured in Yahoo Finance and Hart Energy, highlighted his ability to identify and analyze key industry trends and provide actionable recommendations for businesses navigating the energy transition. His thought leadership in this area helped to position Zenith as a trusted advisor on sustainability and climate-related issues, further enhancing the firm's reputation and influence.

Throughout his tenure at Zenith, Mr. Iyer consistently demonstrated a strong commitment to sustainability and a passion for driving positive change. His impressive project work, leadership roles, and thought leadership contributions showcased his ability to leverage his skills and expertise to make a meaningful impact. His contributions were highly valued by both his colleagues and clients, and he quickly became a trusted advisor on sustainability-related matters.

In conclusion, Mr. Iyer's time at Zenith was marked by exceptional performance and a strong dedication to his work. His impressive project work, leadership roles, and thought leadership contributions showcased his ability to leverage his skills and expertise to make a meaningful impact. His selection as a Sustainability Fellow was a testament to his outstanding contributions and his potential to continue driving positive change in the field of sustainability.

Mr. Iyer's tenure at Zenith provided him with invaluable experience and a deep understanding of the challenges and opportunities in the sustainability space. His work on high-impact projects, such as the renewable energy non-profit and the ocean conservation credits, demonstrated his ability to develop innovative solutions and drive tangible results. His leadership roles within the firm, including co-leading the New York Green Team, showcased his commitment to fostering a culture of sustainability and inspiring others to take action.

Looking ahead, I have no doubt that Mr. Iyer will continue to make significant contributions to the field of sustainability. His impressive track record, combined with his passion for driving positive change, positions him as a leader in this critical area. I am confident that he will continue to leverage his skills and expertise to tackle complex environmental challenges and make a meaningful impact on the world.

In summary, Mr. Iyer's time at Zenith was marked by outstanding performance, a strong commitment to sustainability, and a passion for driving positive change. His impressive project work, leadership roles, and thought leadership contributions showcased his ability to make a meaningful impact. I have no doubt that he will continue to excel in his future endeavors and make significant contributions to the field of sustainability. I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Iyer and am confident that he will continue to make a meaningful impact in the field of sustainability. 

Sincerely,


Raj Malhotra 
Senior Partner
Zenith Industries
final:
Dear Reviewing Officer:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Raghav Iyer,  an individual of extraordinary ability, who has consistently demonstrated his remarkable capabilities through his work at Zenith Industries. As a Senior Partner at Zenith, I have had the opportunity to observe Mr. Iyer's work closely and can attest to his exceptional skills and dedication to his field. 

To provide some context, I have been with Zenith Industries for over 19 years, currently serving as a Senior Partner. Throughout my tenure, I have focused on sustainability and climate technologies, leading the Zenith Platform for Climate Technologies (ZPCT). My expertise extends to areas such as the Internet of Things, semiconductors, and AI, with a particular emphasis on hard-tech solutions for climate impact. In addition to my consulting experience, I have held leadership roles in the biotechnology sector, including serving as the SVP of Commercial Operations and Head of Strategy at Avilla Biotechnologies. This diverse experience has equipped me with a deep understanding of the skills and qualities necessary for success in the fields of sustainability and technology.

Zenith Industries stands as a globally esteemed management consulting firm, renowned for its guidance to business, government, and societal leaders on their most pressing challenges. With a robust workforce of over 40,000 employees spread across more than 130 offices in more than 65 countries, Zenith offers profound expertise and a global outlook, empowering clients to achieve sustainable and inclusive growth. The firm's work extends across a myriad of industries and functions, including strategy, operations, marketing, and technology. As a Senior Partner, I've had the honor of collaborating with clients worldwide to address complex issues and effect meaningful transformation.

Raghav Iyer joined Zenith Industries as a Business Analyst in August 2020, where he quickly set himself apart through his exceptional analytical prowess and unwavering commitment to his work. Throughout his tenure, he engaged in numerous high-impact projects, consistently achieving remarkable results.

A standout accomplishment was his role in developing a financial model and impact analysis that facilitated a $2 billion fundraise and the creation of a new renewable energy non-profit unveiled at COP26, the 26th United Nations Climate Change Conference. This project, aimed at propelling renewable energy and climate solutions, highlighted Mr. Iyer's capacity to tackle intricate challenges and foster substantial change. His analysis was pivotal in securing crucial funding and support, showcasing his expertise in sustainability and his ability to deliver tangible results.

Beyond the renewable energy initiative, Mr. Iyer played a vital role in formulating an EU expansion strategy for a sustainable cement startup. His contributions enabled the company to secure over $100 million in equity, opening significant growth opportunities and positioning the startup for success in the European market. This project underscored Mr. Iyer's strategic acumen and his knack for identifying and harnessing new opportunities. His work was instrumental in the startup's triumph, demonstrating his ability to drive growth and create client value.

Additionally, during his tenure, Mr. Iyer contributed to the groundbreaking development and launch of the world’s first ocean conservation credits, aimed at protecting the entire marine area of Samoa. This pivotal initiative highlighted his innovative approach to complex environmental challenges, underpinning global conservation efforts.

Throughout his time at Zenith, Mr. Iyer consistently demonstrated a profound commitment to sustainability and a fervor for driving positive change. His work on projects such as the renewable energy non-profit, the sustainable cement startup, and the ocean conservation credits demonstrated his capacity to leverage his skills and expertise for meaningful impact. His contributions earned high regard from both colleagues and clients, rapidly establishing him as a trusted advisor on sustainability-related matters.

In October 2022, Mr. Iyer's impressive performance and dedication led to his promotion to Senior Business Analyst. In this elevated role, he continued to excel, embracing even greater responsibilities and delivering stellar results across a diverse range of projects. Notably, he developed a product offtake strategy for a biogas private equity client, aiding them in securing $500 million in debt and equity for their inaugural project, thus laying a robust foundation for future growth and success. This project showcased Mr. Iyer's ability to craft innovative solutions and deliver measurable results.

Furthermore, Mr. Iyer was instrumental in crafting an investment thesis and identifying priority investment themes for a $200 million carveout focused on solar energy. His analysis pinpointed 10 high-priority targets and facilitated the successful due diligence of the first two investments. This endeavor highlighted Mr. Iyer's expertise in sustainable investing and his proficiency in identifying and seizing new opportunities in the renewable energy sector.

Beyond his project work, Mr. Iyer assumed significant leadership roles within the firm. He led the New York Green Team, introducing an office-wide composting initiative and cultivating the office's sustainability community. This initiative not only reflected his dedication to sustainability in client engagements but also within the firm itself. His leadership in this domain helped nurture a sustainability culture at Zenith, inspiring others to take action and make a positive impact.

Mr. Iyer's exceptional performance and unwavering dedication to his work were clearly recognized when he was selected as one of the exclusive Sustainability Fellows in the New York office—and one of only 40 globally—in September 2021. This selection process was highly selective, affirming his expertise and passion for sustainability. The Sustainability Fellowship program was meticulously designed to enhance the firm's prowess in sustainability by identifying and nurturing high-performing individuals capable of leading in this crucial domain. The program offers participants invaluable opportunities to deepen their knowledge and hone their skills in sustainability issues, positioning them as leaders in the field.

Mr. Iyer's acceptance into this prestigious program was a testament to his remarkable contributions and his potential to drive impactful change. As a Sustainability Fellow, he was provided with the platform to engage in a diverse array of high-impact projects, allowing him to further refine his expertise in sustainability and climate-related challenges Throughout his tenure as a Sustainability Fellow, Mr. Iyer excelled remarkably, consistently delivering outstanding outcomes and spearheading meaningful change. Projects like the ocean conservation credits highlighted his adeptness in applying his skills and expertise to address urgent environmental issues significantly. His contributions were greatly valued by peers and clients alike, quickly solidifying his reputation as a trusted advisor on sustainability matters.

Being selected as a Sustainability Fellow underscored Mr. Iyer's exceptional performance and dedication to advancing sustainable solutions. The program offered him a profound platform to further develop his competencies and expertise in sustainability, positioning him as a prominent leader in this critical arena. His contributions during this period were profoundly impactful, leaving a lasting positive imprint on the firm’s sustainability endeavors.

In conclusion, Mr. Iyer's tenure at Zenith demonstrated exceptional performance and unwavering dedication to sustainability. Through impactful projects like the renewable energy non-profit and ocean conservation credits, he showcased his ability to create innovative solutions and achieve tangible results. His leadership within the firm, including leading the New York Green Team and being selected as a Sustainability Fellow, reflects his commitment to inspiring positive change and fostering a culture of sustainability. I am confident that with his impressive track record and passion for the field, Mr. Iyer will continue to excel and make significant contributions to sustainability efforts globally. I wholeheartedly recommend him for his expertise and impact in the field.

If you require any additional information or clarification regarding my recommendation of Mr. Iyer, please feel free to contact me. I would be more than happy to provide further insights into his qualifications and contributions.

Respectfully Submitted, 


Raj Malhotra
Senior Partner  
Zenith Industries
[email contact here]
